RequestBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

ResponseBody.name: MyAgent
ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd

# Load the CSV file
file_path = '/mnt/data/assistant-P93diXcepvizvnZ69cgcpG-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv'
data = pd.read_csv(file_path)

# Display the first few rows of the dataframe to understand its structure
data.head()

# Filter data for the TRANSPORTATION sector
transportation_data = data[data['sector'] == 'TRANSPORTATION']

# Convert 'operating_profit' to numeric, handling commas and missing values
transportation_data['operating_profit'] = pd.to_numeric(transportation_data['operating_profit'].str.replace(',', ''), errors='coerce')

# Plot the bar chart
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.bar(transportation_data['name'], transportation_data['operating_profit'], color='skyblue')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.xlabel('Company')
plt.ylabel('Operating Profit')
plt.title('Operating Profit in Transportation Sector')
plt.tight_layout()

# Save the plot as an image
chart_path = '/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit.png'
plt.savefig(chart_path)

chart_path

content.text: I have created a bar chart for the operating profit in the transportation sector. You can [download the chart here](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit.png).
